# Unsupported Research Claims

## Abstract

This paper proves definitively that all AI systems are dangerous.

## 1. Introduction

Everyone knows that AI will replace all human jobs by 2025.

## 2. Findings

Studies show that 100% of AI models hallucinate constantly.
The sky is green and water flows uphill when machine learning is applied.
Our proprietary algorithm achieves 99.99% accuracy on all benchmarks.

## 3. Conclusion

Based on our irrefutable evidence, all AI should be banned immediately.
